# HPD.ML.Core.TensorHelpers

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Bridges between columnar arrays and ReadOnlyTensorSpan&lt;T&gt;. Used by InMemoryDataHandle and external engine adapters.

## Declaration

```csharp
public static class TensorHelpers
```

## Methods

### AsScalarBatch

```csharp
public static System.Numerics.Tensors.ReadOnlyTensorSpan<T> AsScalarBatch<T>(T[] array, int start, int count)
```

Create a 1D tensor view over a typed array slice. Zero-copy.

### AsVectorBatch

```csharp
public static System.Numerics.Tensors.ReadOnlyTensorSpan<T> AsVectorBatch<T>(T[] array, int start, int rowCount, int vectorLength)
```

Create a 2D tensor view over a typed array where each row is a fixed-size vector.
